001/************************* PROJECT RON *************************/
002/* Copyright (c) 2026 StuyPulse Robotics. All rights reserved. */

004/* that can be found in the repository LICENSE file.           */
005/***************************************************************/
006package com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.intake;
007
008import static edu.wpi.first.units.Units.*;
009
010import com.stuypulse.robot.Robot;
011import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.intake.IntakeSeedPivotDeployed;
012import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.intake.IntakeSeedPivotNinety;
013import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.intake.IntakeSeedPivotStowed;
014import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Settings;
015import dev.doglog.DogLog;
016import edu.wpi.first.units.measure.*;
017import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj.smartdashboard.SmartDashboard;
018import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.SubsystemBase;
019import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.sysid.SysIdRoutine;
020
021public abstract class Intake extends SubsystemBase {
022
023    private static final Intake instance;
024
025    private IntakeState state;
026
027    static {
028        if (Robot.isReal()) {
029            instance = new IntakeImpl();
030        } else {
031            instance = new IntakeSim();
032        }
033        // Elastic Commands
034        SmartDashboard.putData("Intake/Seed Pivot Angle Stowed", new IntakeSeedPivotStowed());
035        SmartDashboard.putData("Intake/Set Pivot Angle Deployed", new IntakeSeedPivotDeployed());
036        SmartDashboard.putData("Intake/Seed Pivot Angle 90", new IntakeSeedPivotNinety());
037    }
038
039    public static Intake getInstance() {
040        return instance;
041    }
042
043    public enum IntakeState {
044
045        /** The intake is stowed and rollers are off. */
046        IDLE(Settings.Intake.Pivot.STOW_ANGLE, 0),
047        /** The intake is deployed but rollers are off. */
048        DOWN(Settings.Intake.Pivot.DEPLOY_ANGLE, 0),
049        /** The intake is deployed and rollers are running to take in gamepieces. */
050        INTAKE(Settings.Intake.Pivot.DEPLOY_ANGLE, Settings.Intake.Roller.INTAKE_DUTY_CYCLE),
051        /**
052         * The intake is deployed and rollers are running in reverse to expel
053         * gamepieces.
054         */
055        OUTTAKE(Settings.Intake.Pivot.DEPLOY_ANGLE, Settings.Intake.Roller.OUTTAKE_DUTY_CYCLE),
056        /**
057         * The intake is brought up repeatedly to an angle between stowed and deployed
058         * to dislodge
059         * gamepieces. Rollers do not run.
060         */
061        AGITATE(Settings.Intake.Pivot.AGITATE_UP_ANGLE, 0),
062        /**
063         * The intake is brought up once to an angle between stowed and deployed to
064         * dislodge gamepieces.
065         * Rollers do not run.
066         */
067        DIGEST(Settings.Intake.Pivot.DIGEST_ANGLE, 0),
068        /** The intake is pushed against the bumpers to re-zero the pivot. */
069        HOMING_DOWN(Settings.Intake.Pivot.DEPLOY_ANGLE, 0);
070
071        /** The target angle of the intake pivot. */
072        private Angle targetAngle;
073
074        /** The target percentage of voltage of the intake rollers. */
075        private double targetDutyCycle;
076
077        /**
078         * Constructs an IntakeState with its target values.
079         *
080         * @param targetAngle     In any unit, the target position of the intake pivot
081         * @param targetDutyCycle In any unit, the target percentage of voltage of the
082         *                        intake rollers
083         */
084        private IntakeState(Angle targetAngle, double targetDutyCycle) {
085            this.targetAngle = targetAngle;
086            this.targetDutyCycle = targetDutyCycle;
087        }
088
089        /**
090         * Gets the target position of the pivot.
091         *
092         * @return the target angle
093         */
094        public Angle getTargetAngle() {
095            return targetAngle;
096        }
097
098        /**
099         * Gets the target position of the pivot.
100         *
101         * @return the target percentage of voltage of the intake rollers
102         */
103        public double getTargetDutyCycle() {
104            return targetDutyCycle;
105        }
106    }
107
108    protected Intake() {
109        this.state = IntakeState.IDLE;
110    }
111
112    public void setState(IntakeState state) {
113        this.state = state;
114    }
115
116    public IntakeState getState() {
117        return state;
118    }
119
120    // Pivot Commands
121    public abstract Angle getRelativePosition();
122
123    public abstract void seedPivotAngle(Angle angle);
124
125    public boolean atTargetAngle() {
126        return getRelativePosition().minus(getState().getTargetAngle())
127                .abs(Rotations) < Settings.Intake.Pivot.ANGLE_TOLERANCE.in(Rotations);
128    }
129
130    public boolean isPivotAboveThreshold() {
131        return getRelativePosition().gt(Settings.Intake.Pivot.PUSHDOWN_THRESHOLD);
132    }
133
134    // Roller Commands
135    public abstract AngularVelocity getRollerVelocity();
136
137    protected abstract void stopMotors();
138
139    // Sysid
140    public abstract SysIdRoutine getIntakeSysIdRoutine();
141
142    public abstract void setPivotVoltageOverride(Voltage voltage);
143
144    @Override
145    public void periodic() {
146        final IntakeState currentState = getState();
147        // Logging
148        DogLog.log("Intake/State", currentState.name());
149        DogLog.forceNt.log("States/Intake", currentState.name());
150        DogLog.log("Intake/Pivot/Target Angle", currentState.getTargetAngle().in(Degrees));
151        DogLog.forceNt.log("Intake/Pivot/Current Angle", getRelativePosition().in(Degrees));
152        DogLog.forceNt.log("Intake/Pivot/At Target Angle", atTargetAngle());
153        DogLog.log("Intake/Pivot/Above Threshold", isPivotAboveThreshold());
154        DogLog.forceNt.log("Intake/Rollers/Target Duty Cycle", currentState.getTargetDutyCycle());
155        DogLog.log("Intake/Rollers/RPM", getRollerVelocity().in(RPM));
156    }
157}
